2 min read
Just now

--

Project Overview
Contact App is a small full‑stack demo that lets users submit a contact form and stores the data in a lightweight database. The front‑end is a modern React SPA built with Vite, while the back‑end is a Python FastAPI service exposing a tiny REST API.
Tech Stack
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Request Flow

• Browser → Vite dev server (http://localhost:5173) – serves the React SPA with hot‑module replacement.

• React sends a POST /api/contact request with the form data (via the Fetch API).

• FastAPI (http://localhost:8000) validates the payload, writes a row into contacts.db (SQLite), and returns a JSON success response.

• React shows a success toast to the user.
Full Repository Structure
contactapp/
├─ backend/
│ ├─ main.py
│ ├─ database.py
│ ├─ schemas.py
│ ├─ requirements.txt
│ └─ uploads/
├─ frontend/
│ ├─ src/
│ │ ├─ api.js
│ │ ├─ App.jsx
│ │ ├─ pages/
│ │ │ ├─ ContactPage.jsx
│ │ │ └─ AdminPage.jsx
│ │ └─ styles.css
│ ├─ index.html
│ └─ vite.config.js
├─ .env.example
├─ .gitignore
└─ README.md
TL;DR — Tech Stack & How the App Works
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Quick start commands
# ── backend ──
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
# ── frontend ──
npm install
npm run dev
Github Url : https://github.com/yashica444-tech/contact-form
